channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Lesser-known Nigerian universities shaping high-performing graduates
item.description: For Nigeria, plenty popular universities dey always take the spotlight, but this report shine light on some lesser-known institutions wey dey quietly produce very strong graduates across different fie...

item.title: ADC and PDP to Present Single Candidate for 2027 Presidential Election
item.description: Ahead of the 2027 general elections, the African Democratic Congress (ADC) and a faction of the People's Democratic Party (PDP) have reached an agreement to field a joint candidate for the presidentia...

item.title: FBI Investigates Disappearance of Naiping Hou, Father of Crypto Investor
item.description: The FBI is investigating the suspicious disappearance of Naiping Hou, a 74-year-old from Rancho Cucamonga, California. His family believes the incident may be linked to the success of his son, Wen Hou...

item.title: Deepti Sharma's all-round performance leads India to victory over Proteas Women
item.description: India’s Deepti Sharma delivered an outstanding all-round performance in the fourth T20I at the Wanderers, guiding India to a 14-run victory over the Proteas Women. Sharma, who had been struggling with...

item.title: Motorcyclist seriously injured after crash with car in Mississauga
item.description: A motorcyclist sustained serious injuries following a collision with a car in Mississauga, prompting an emergency response and road closures in the area. According to Peel Regional Police, the crash o...

item.title: Stormers climb to top of URC standings as Lions secure dominant home win
item.description: The Stormers delivered a commanding performance in Cape Town, beating Glasgow Warriors 48-12 to move to the top of the United Rugby Championship (URC) table with two matches remaining. The bonus-point...

item.title: Vice Ganda highlights Lassy’s comedic performance portraying a dog on It’s Showtime
item.description: Ibinida ni Vice Ganda sa noontime show na “It’s Showtime” ang nakakaaliw na performance ni Lassy, kung saan ipinakita nito ang iba’t ibang talento habang ginagampanan ang karakter ng isang aso. Sa seg...

item.title: Miles Bergman scores impressive goal for Port Adelaide against Geelong
item.description: Port Adelaide's midfielder Miles Bergman produced a standout moment in their recent AFL clash against Geelong, scoring an impressive goal following a high-pressure play. Demonstrating quick thinking a...

item.title: Kerala-born man in Kolkata loses voter ID due to SIR deletion
item.description: Benjamin, known as Benji, a 50-year-old man born in Kerala and raised without his parents, has faced a unique bureaucratic challenge in Kolkata. Orphaned at birth, he spent his early years in a Kerala...

item.title: How Partition‑era violence and insecurity shaped the exodus of Hindus and Sikhs from Afghanistan
item.description: The article explains how the communal bloodshed following the Partition of India in 1947 triggered fear and displacement among Hindus and Sikhs living in Afghanistan, even though Kabul itself remained...

item.title: Liverpool boost top-four hopes with Palace win as Salah injury raises concern
item.description: Liverpool strengthened their push for UEFA Champions League qualification with a solid 3-1 victory over Crystal Palace at Anfield, but the result was overshadowed by a worrying injury to Mohamed Salah...

item.title: Keir Starmer defends decision to dismiss Olly Robbins and commits to ongoing leadership
item.description: Labour leader Sir Keir Starmer has confirmed his decision to dismiss Olly Robbins, the party's chief adviser, amid ongoing scrutiny over internal party management. Despite criticism from some quarters...

item.title: The Ongoing Struggles of PHLPost: Addressing Delivery Issues
item.description: The Philippine Postal Corporation (PHLPost) has been facing ongoing challenges in its delivery services, causing significant delays and inconvenience for customers. This systemic breakdown is a result...

item.title: Miles Bergman scores crucial goal in Port Adelaide's win over Geelong
item.description: Port Adelaide star Miles Bergman delivered a brilliant performance in their AFL clash against Geelong, kicking a vital goal under intense pressure. In the second quarter, Bergman received the ball in ...

item.title: Ottawa Charge clinches playoff berth with 3-0 victory over Toronto Sceptres
item.description: The Ottawa Charge have secured the final playoff spot in the Professional Women’s Hockey League (PWHL) after a 3-0 victory against the Toronto Sceptres. Goaltender Gwyneth Philips was outstanding, sto...

item.title: BJP alleges private funds used for Kejriwal’s official residence; AAP denies and threatens legal action
item.description: A political controversy has emerged in Delhi after the Bharatiya Janata Party (BJP) accused Aam Aadmi Party (AAP) leader and former Chief Minister Arvind Kejriwal of using private funds to furnish his...

item.title: Mchunu and Makitinca lead exciting night of knockouts at ABP's Knockout Chaos
item.description: Aquilla Boxing Promotions’ first event of the year, 'Knockout Chaos', delivered an electrifying night of boxing at the Galleria in Sandton, with five out of eight bouts ending in knockouts. The promot...

item.title: UK National Lottery results: Lotto and Thunderball numbers for 25 April draw
item.description: The National Lottery results for Saturday 25 April have been officially released, revealing the winning numbers for both the Lotto and Thunderball draws. The Lotto jackpot for this draw stood at an es...

item.title: Fourth Edition of Ramamurthi and Tandon's Neurosurgery Textbook Launched in Chennai
item.description: The fourth edition of the renowned 'Ramamurthi and Tandon Textbook of Neurosurgery' was launched in Chennai at the Vol Health Services Specialty Hospital Research Centre. This comprehensive volume fea...

item.title: President Trump Calls Off Diplomatic Mission to Pakistan Amid Iran Conflict Standoff
item.description: On Saturday, April 25, 2026, President Donald Trump officially cancelled a high-level diplomatic mission to Islamabad, Pakistan, which was intended to facilitate peace negotiations regarding the ongoi...
